"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.default = _regeneratorKeys; function _regeneratorKeys(val) { var object = Object(val); var keys = []; var key; for (var key in object) { keys.unshift(key); } return function next() { while (keys.length) { key = keys.pop(); if (key in object) { next.value = key; next.done = false; return next; } } next.done = true; return next; }; } //# sourceMappingURL=regeneratorKeys.js.map
